_translatorNotes.soloScenarioNames: Solo scenario name keys have the format '#N CharacterName/Edition: Scenario Title'. Only translate the 'Scenario Title' part after the colon. Do NOT translate 'CharacterName' or 'Edition' — they are parsed at runtime to look up the character icon and edition label.
_translatorNotes.cardTextPrefixes: Card text strings starting with '^' or '^^' must keep those prefix characters in the translated value. They control line layout, not content.
_translatorNotes.tokenPlaceholders: Strings containing %token% placeholders (e.g. %attack%, %range%, %poison%) must keep those placeholders unchanged in the translated value.
